Transcendent Weapon Augmenting  
 

No Trade
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Transcendent Weapon Augmenting
No Trade
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY

Language:Common Tongue
Item Type:Book
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:10 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:8
Lucy Entry By:Amio - Township Rebellion
Item Updated By:Gidono
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-19 10:20:46
Page Updated:Sat Jul 5th, 2025

Expansion: Rain of Fear
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 96
[Book Text | Merchants | Scribe to Learn (Optional) | Comments ]

Scribe to Learn (Optional):
  • Transcendent Nimble Symbol of Below
  • Transcendent Nimble Symbol of Compassion
  • Transcendent Nimble Symbol of Decay
  • Transcendent Nimble Symbol of Devotion
  • Transcendent Nimble Symbol of Growth
  • Transcendent Nimble Symbol of Hate
  • Transcendent Nimble Symbol of Infestation
  • Transcendent Nimble Symbol of Integrity
  • Transcendent Nimble Symbol of Judgement
  • Transcendent Nimble Symbol of Malignancy
  • Transcendent Nimble Symbol of Stillness
  • Transcendent Nimble Symbol of Storms
  • Transcendent Nimble Symbol of Terror

  • Transcendent Nimble Symbol of Wildfire
  • Transcendent Nimble Symbol of the Brood
  • Transcendent Nimble Symbol of the Depths
  • Transcendent Nimble Symbol of the Farceur
  • Transcendent Nimble Symbol of the Fire Lord
  • Transcendent Nimble Symbol of the Skeptic
  • Transcendent Nimble Symbol of the Warmonger
  • Transcendent Penetrating Symbol of Below
  • Transcendent Penetrating Symbol of Compassion
  • Transcendent Penetrating Symbol of Decay
  • Transcendent Penetrating Symbol of Devotion
  • Transcendent Penetrating Symbol of Growth
  • Transcendent Penetrating Symbol of Hate
  • Transcendent Penetrating Symbol of Infestation
  • Transcendent Penetrating Symbol of Integrity
  • Transcendent Penetrating Symbol of Judgement
  • Transcendent Penetrating Symbol of Malignancy
  • Transcendent Penetrating Symbol of Stillness
  • Transcendent Penetrating Symbol of Storms
  • Transcendent Penetrating Symbol of Terror
  • Transcendent Penetrating Symbol of Thaumaturgy
  • Transcendent Penetrating Symbol of Wildfire
  • Transcendent Penetrating Symbol of the Brood
  • Transcendent Penetrating Symbol of the Depths
  • Transcendent Penetrating Symbol of the Farceur
  • Transcendent Penetrating Symbol of the Fire Lord
  • Transcendent Penetrating Symbol of the Skeptic
  • Transcendent Penetrating Symbol of the Warmonger

  • Transcendent Vicious Symbol of Compassion
  • Transcendent Vicious Symbol of Decay
  • Transcendent Vicious Symbol of Devotion
  • Transcendent Vicious Symbol of Growth
  • Transcendent Vicious Symbol of Infestation
  • Transcendent Vicious Symbol of Integrity
  • Transcendent Vicious Symbol of Judgement
  • Transcendent Vicious Symbol of Malignancy
  • Transcendent Vicious Symbol of Stillness
  • Transcendent Vicious Symbol of Storms

Merchants


Vendor listing - Premium only

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Abysmal Sea
Ak'Anon
Cabilis East
Crescent Reach
Degmar, the Lost Castle
Erudin Palace
Firiona Vie
North Kaladim
North Qeynos
Northern Felwithe
Plane of Tranquility
Ruins of Shadow Haven
Shar Vahl
Shard's Landing
The Overthere [RoS]
The Plane of Knowledge
The Rathe Mountains
Book Text:

This tome contains exact
diagrams on the creation of
various Transcendent Weapon
Symbols. The overview of
these details can be found
in book five of the five
part set 'Compendiums on
Regal Weapon Creation'.

All of the weapon symbols
detailed in this tome will
use...
- a Diamond
- Befouled Spinneret
Fluid,
- Vial of Purified Mana,
- Blessed Water of a
particular deity.

And then one of the
following:
- Trilion Cut Tool,
- Marquise Cut Tool, or
- Half-Moon Cut Tool.


A trilion cut is used for
nimble weapon symbols.
These symbols are fit for
one handed blunt, one
handed slash and hand to
hand weaponry.

A marquise cut is used for
penetrating weapon symbols.
These symbols are fit for
one handed piercing
weaponry.
A half-moon cut is used for
vicious symbols. These
symbols are fit for all
two-handed weaponry.

Each symbol can be attuned
to the powers of a deity
through the use of Blessed
Water, for those seeking no
deity affinity you would
use Water of the Skeptic.
Unlike culturally inspired


armors, the blessings of a
deity on weapon symbols do
not restrict the use of
that symbol to followers of
that deity.

Reference book five of the
Compendiums Set to see what
power each deity's blessing
will grant the weapon
symbol.
 
Send a correction
Post Comment
In Ak'Anon
